raw: {"weights": {"R1.1": 0.0, "R1.2": 0.7, "R1.3": 0.7, "R1.4": 0.7, "R1.5": 0.0, "R1.6": 0.7, "R1.7": 0.7, "RX.1": 0.7, "RX.2": 0.7, "RX.3": 0.7, "RX.4": 0.7, "RX.5": 0.7}, "active_set": ["R1.2", "R1.3", "R1.4", "R1.6", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"], "category_focus": "R1", "clarification_needed": false, "clarification_question": "", "rationale": {"R1.2": "Logical consistency is central to assessing the overall quality of the research argument presented in the draft.", "R1.3": "Aligning claims with reported evidence is a key expected component when giving thoughts on the validity of the results.", "R1.4": "Evaluating novelty against prior work is central to determining the contribution's value in a general review.", "R1.6": "Writing polish affects the readability and professionalism, making it a central aspect of feedback on the draft.", "R1.7": "Checking citation accuracy and literature coverage is expected in thoughts on a research draft's scholarship.", "RX.1": "Disclosing uncertainties is crucial for honest reporting, centrally relevant in evaluating the draft.", "RX.2": "Avoiding overclaims ensures the work is presented accurately, a central cross-cutting concern.", "RX.3": "Adhering to the stated scope maintains focus, expected in any review of the artifact.", "RX.4": "Considering potential downstream harms is important for responsible AI research on ASR systems.", "RX.5": "Ensuring provenance and traceability of methods and data is central for reproducibility."}}

rationale.R1.2: Logical consistency is central to assessing the overall quality of the research argument presented in the draft.
rationale.R1.3: Aligning claims with reported evidence is a key expected component when giving thoughts on the validity of the results.
rationale.R1.4: Evaluating novelty against prior work is central to determining the contribution's value in a general review.
rationale.R1.6: Writing polish affects the readability and professionalism, making it a central aspect of feedback on the draft.
rationale.R1.7: Checking citation accuracy and literature coverage is expected in thoughts on a research draft's scholarship.
rationale.RX.1: Disclosing uncertainties is crucial for honest reporting, centrally relevant in evaluating the draft.
rationale.RX.2: Avoiding overclaims ensures the work is presented accurately, a central cross-cutting concern.
rationale.RX.3: Adhering to the stated scope maintains focus, expected in any review of the artifact.
rationale.RX.4: Considering potential downstream harms is important for responsible AI research on ASR systems.
rationale.RX.5: Ensuring provenance and traceability of methods and data is central for reproducibility.
